metadata.onet_source: O*NET Online (US Department of Labor) - Multiple SOC Groups
metadata.note: Skills, education levels, and experience ranges are enriched from O*NET data. Salary ranges are India-specific (INR). Excludes Technology/IT and Management domains.

jobs.title: General Physician / MBBS Doctor
jobs.description: Diagnose and treat a wide range of illnesses and injuries in clinical or hospital settings. Provide preventive care, prescribe medications, and refer patients to specialists as needed.
roles_responsibilities: Examine patients and record medical histories
Order and interpret diagnostic tests
Diagnose and treat acute and chronic conditions
Prescribe medications and treatment plans
Educate patients on preventive healthcare
Coordinate with specialists and other healthcare providers

educational_qualification.minimum: MBBS (Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery)
alternative: BAMS (Ayurveda)
BHMS (Homeopathy) for alternative medicine paths

jobs.future_scope: Evergreen profession with strong demand in tier-2/tier-3 cities. Telemedicine is opening new avenues for digital practice.

jobs.title: Specialist Doctor (Surgeon / Cardiologist / Neurologist etc.)
jobs.description: Provide specialized medical care in a defined medical discipline such as surgery, cardiology, neurology, or orthopedics. Manage complex cases requiring deep domain expertise.
roles_responsibilities: Perform specialized diagnostic evaluations
Conduct surgeries or specialized interventional procedures
Develop advanced treatment protocols
Supervise resident doctors and medical teams
Publish and contribute to medical research
Manage ICU or critical care units in respective specialty

alternative: Foreign Medical Graduates with NMC equivalence

jobs.future_scope: Super-specialists are in very high demand in tier-1 cities and corporate hospitals. International opportunities are also strong.

jobs.title: Registered Nurse (RN)
jobs.description: Provide direct patient care, administer medications, monitor patient health, and coordinate with physicians to deliver comprehensive nursing care in hospitals, clinics, or community settings.
roles_responsibilities: Administer medications and IV therapies
Monitor and record vital signs
Assist physicians during procedures
Educate patients and families on care plans
Maintain patient care documentation
Coordinate discharge planning

educational_qualification.minimum: B.Sc Nursing or GNM (General Nursing & Midwifery)
alternative: Diploma in Nursing with state registration

jobs.future_scope: High global demand especially in Middle East, UK, USA, and Canada. India has a large nursing workforce export base.

jobs.title: Pharmacist
jobs.description: Dispense medications prescribed by physicians, counsel patients on drug usage and side effects, and ensure safe and effective pharmaceutical care in retail, hospital, or clinical pharmacy settings.
roles_responsibilities: Dispense prescription medications accurately
Review prescriptions for drug interactions and errors
Counsel patients on proper medication usage
Maintain medication inventory and records
Collaborate with physicians on drug therapies
Ensure regulatory compliance in pharmacy operations

alternative: D.Pharm (Diploma in Pharmacy) for retail pharmacy

jobs.future_scope: Growing demand in hospital pharmacy and clinical pharmacy roles. Pharmaceutical research careers offer strong upward trajectory.

jobs.title: Dentist
jobs.description: Diagnose and treat problems affecting teeth and oral tissues. Perform procedures such as fillings, extractions, root canals, and orthodontics to maintain and restore patient oral health.
roles_responsibilities: Examine patients' teeth, gums, and oral health
Diagnose dental conditions using X-rays and clinical examination
Perform fillings, extractions, root canals, and crowns
Provide orthodontic and cosmetic dental treatments
Educate patients on oral hygiene
Maintain dental records and manage clinic workflow

preferred: MDS (Master of Dental Surgery) for specialization

jobs.future_scope: Own clinic potential is high. Cosmetic dentistry and implantology are fast-growing specializations with premium earning potential.

jobs.title: Physiotherapist
jobs.description: Assess and treat physical dysfunction, movement disorders, and pain through therapeutic exercise, manual therapy, and rehabilitation programs for patients recovering from injuries or managing chronic conditions.
roles_responsibilities: Assess patients' physical conditions and mobility
Design and implement rehabilitation programs
Administer manual therapy and electrotherapy
Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans
Educate patients on exercises and injury prevention
Collaborate with orthopedic and neurological specialists

alternative: Diploma in Physiotherapy for assistant roles

jobs.future_scope: Growing demand with aging population, sports medicine, and post-COVID rehab. Sports physiotherapy is a high-growth niche.

jobs.title: Radiologist / Radiographer
jobs.description: Use medical imaging technologies such as X-ray, MRI, CT, and ultrasound to diagnose diseases. Radiologists interpret images; radiographers operate imaging equipment.
roles_responsibilities: Operate diagnostic imaging equipment
Interpret X-rays, MRI, CT, and ultrasound images
Prepare radiological reports for clinicians
Ensure patient safety during imaging procedures
Maintain imaging equipment and radiation safety protocols
Guide image-guided interventional procedures (for radiologists)

educational_qualification.minimum: MBBS + MD Radiology (for Radiologist) / B.Sc Medical Imaging (for Radiographer)
alternative: Diploma in Medical Imaging Technology

jobs.future_scope: AI-assisted radiology is emerging but radiologists remain essential for complex interpretations. Tele-radiology is opening remote work options.

jobs.title: Psychologist / Counselor
jobs.description: Assess, diagnose, and treat mental health disorders through psychotherapy, behavioral interventions, and counseling. Work in clinical, educational, or organizational settings.
roles_responsibilities: Conduct psychological assessments and evaluations
Provide individual, group, or family therapy
Develop treatment plans for mental health conditions
Assist patients with cognitive-behavioral techniques
Maintain confidential case records
Collaborate with psychiatrists and other healthcare providers

alternative: Post-Graduate Diploma in Counseling Psychology

jobs.future_scope: Mental health awareness is rapidly increasing in India. Corporate wellness, digital mental health platforms, and schools are major growth areas.

jobs.title: Junior Advocate / Junior Lawyer
jobs.description: Assist senior advocates in legal research, drafting documents, and representing clients in lower courts. Build foundational expertise in civil, criminal, or corporate law.
roles_responsibilities: Conduct legal research and case analysis
Draft petitions, plaints, and legal documents
Assist senior lawyers in court proceedings
Maintain client files and case records
Attend client meetings and collect statements
Review and summarize legal contracts
skills_required: Knowledge of Indian Penal Code / Civil Law

educational_qualification.minimum: LLB (3-year after graduation) or BA LLB / BBA LLB (5-year integrated)

jobs.future_scope: Advocacy careers take time but high court and Supreme Court advocates earn substantially. Corporate law offers faster financial growth.

jobs.title: Corporate Lawyer / Legal Counsel
jobs.description: Provide legal advisory services to businesses on contracts, mergers, acquisitions, intellectual property, and regulatory compliance. Work in-house with corporations or in law firms.
roles_responsibilities: Draft and review commercial contracts and agreements
Advise on mergers, acquisitions, and corporate structuring
Ensure regulatory and statutory compliance
Manage litigation and dispute resolution
Protect intellectual property and trademarks
Liaise with external counsel and regulatory bodies

alternative: CA + LLB for tax and financial law roles

jobs.future_scope: In-house legal counsel roles are growing rapidly as Indian startups and MNCs expand. M&A, fintech, and IP law are high-demand specializations.

jobs.title: Paralegal / Legal Assistant
jobs.description: Support lawyers by conducting research, preparing legal documents, managing case files, and performing administrative tasks in law firms, corporate legal departments, or courts.
roles_responsibilities: Conduct legal research on case laws and statutes
Draft routine legal documents and correspondence
Organize and maintain case files and records
Schedule court dates and manage legal calendars
Coordinate with clients, courts, and opposing counsel
Assist in e-filing documents with courts

alternative: Certificate in Legal Studies with relevant experience

jobs.future_scope: Entry point for law careers. Many paralegals pursue LLB while working. Corporate paralegal roles in large firms offer good stability.

jobs.title: Judge / Judicial Officer
jobs.description: Preside over court proceedings, interpret laws, evaluate evidence, and deliver judgments in civil, criminal, family, or commercial cases at district, high court, or specialized tribunal levels.
roles_responsibilities: Preside over hearings, trials, and proceedings
Evaluate arguments and evidence from both parties
Interpret and apply laws and legal precedents
Deliver written judgments and orders
Manage court dockets and case timelines
Ensure fair and impartial administration of justice

educational_qualification.minimum: LLB + Pass PCS (J) / Judicial Services Examination
alternative: Direct recruitment via High Court for senior positions

jobs.future_scope: Highly respected public service career. Promotions to High Court and Supreme Court are merit-based. Judiciary is expanding with new court infrastructure.

jobs.title: Company Secretary (CS)
jobs.description: Ensure that a company complies with legal and regulatory requirements, manage corporate governance, file statutory returns, and advise the board on legal matters.
roles_responsibilities: Ensure compliance with Companies Act and SEBI regulations
Prepare and file statutory returns with MCA and SEBI
Organize board and shareholder meetings
Maintain statutory registers and company records
Advise directors on corporate governance
Handle secretarial audits and due diligence
jobs.future_scope: Mandatory requirement in listed companies and large firms. SEBI's evolving regulations are increasing demand for qualified CS professionals.

jobs.title: School Teacher (Primary / Secondary)
jobs.description: Teach students across subjects at primary or secondary school level. Plan lessons, assess student performance, and foster intellectual and personal development in young learners.
roles_responsibilities: Prepare and deliver engaging lesson plans
Assess and grade student assignments and tests
Identify and support students with learning difficulties
Maintain classroom discipline and positive environment
Communicate with parents about student progress
Participate in school events and extracurriculars

educational_qualification.minimum: Bachelor's Degree in relevant subject + B.Ed (Bachelor of Education)
alternative: Diploma in Elementary Education (D.El.Ed) for primary school

jobs.future_scope: Government school teachers have job security and pension benefits. Private and international schools offer better pay. EdTech opens content creation opportunities.

jobs.title: College / University Professor
jobs.description: Teach undergraduate and postgraduate students at colleges and universities. Conduct research, publish academic papers, guide dissertations, and contribute to curriculum development.
roles_responsibilities: Deliver lectures and conduct tutorials for college students
Design course curricula and examination papers
Guide student research projects and dissertations
Publish research in peer-reviewed journals
Participate in academic committees and faculty meetings
Apply for research grants and projects
jobs.future_scope: Growing higher education sector with NEP 2020 reforms creating new universities and programs. Research and consultancy offer supplemental income.

jobs.title: Special Education Teacher
jobs.description: Teach students with physical, cognitive, emotional, or learning disabilities. Develop individualized education programs (IEPs) and adapt teaching methods to meet diverse learner needs.
roles_responsibilities: Assess students' unique learning needs and abilities
Design and implement Individualized Education Programs (IEPs)
Adapt curriculum and teaching methods for differently-abled students
Collaborate with parents, therapists, and school staff
Monitor and document student progress
Use assistive technologies to support learning
jobs.future_scope: Increasing awareness and policy support for inclusive education under NEP 2020. Growing demand in special schools, NGOs, and mainstream schools.

jobs.title: EdTech Content Developer / Curriculum Designer
jobs.description: Create digital educational content, design curriculum frameworks, and develop learning materials for EdTech platforms, schools, or corporate training programs.
roles_responsibilities: Design curriculum outlines and learning objectives
Develop video lectures, study guides, and e-learning modules
Align content with educational standards and syllabi
Collaborate with subject matter experts and graphic designers
Review and update content based on learner feedback
Develop assessments and practice questions

alternative: Strong subject knowledge + portfolio of created content

jobs.future_scope: Explosive growth in EdTech (BYJU'S, Unacademy, Vedantu, upGrad). Freelance content creation also offers strong income potential.

jobs.title: Academic Counselor / Career Counselor
jobs.description: Guide students in academic planning, career exploration, college admissions, and skill development. Support students in making informed decisions about their educational and professional futures.
roles_responsibilities: Conduct one-on-one counseling sessions with students
Assess student aptitudes, interests, and career goals
Guide students through college and course selection
Assist with scholarship applications and higher education planning
Organize career fairs and college awareness programs
Track student academic progress and intervene when needed
skills_required: Knowledge of Entrance Exams (JEE, NEET, CUET)

alternative: Certification from recognized career counseling bodies (e.g., NCDA)

jobs.future_scope: Growing awareness of career planning in India. Schools, EdTech companies, and independent practices are all hiring. International counseling (study abroad) is lucrative.

jobs.title: Chartered Accountant (CA)
jobs.description: Perform auditing, taxation, financial reporting, and advisory services. CAs are licensed by ICAI and work in public practice, industry, or government.
roles_responsibilities: Prepare and audit financial statements
File income tax and GST returns for individuals and businesses
Conduct internal and statutory audits
Provide tax planning and advisory services
Ensure compliance with Companies Act and tax laws
Represent clients before tax authorities

educational_qualification.minimum: CA qualification from ICAI (after clearing Foundation, Intermediate, Final exams)
preferred: CA + LLB for tax law specialization

jobs.future_scope: One of India's most respected and well-paid professions. Own practice, Big 4 firms, and CFO roles all offer strong career progression.

jobs.title: Accountant / Senior Accountant
jobs.description: Maintain accurate financial records, prepare accounting entries, reconcile accounts, and support financial reporting functions for organizations.
roles_responsibilities: Record and maintain financial transactions (journal entries)
Prepare bank reconciliation statements
Manage accounts payable and receivable
Assist in preparation of financial statements
File GST returns and support tax compliance
Support auditors during audit processes

alternative: B.Com + Tally/SAP certification

jobs.future_scope: Widely available across industries. CMA or CA qualification while working can accelerate career progression significantly.

jobs.title: Investment Banker / Financial Analyst (Investment Banking)
jobs.description: Provide financial advisory on capital markets, mergers & acquisitions, IPOs, and fundraising. Conduct financial modeling, valuation, and due diligence for corporate clients.
roles_responsibilities: Build complex financial models (DCF, LBO, M&A accretion-dilution)
Conduct company and sector research and valuation
Prepare pitch books and information memoranda
Support deal execution for IPOs, M&A, and PE transactions
Perform due diligence on target companies
Coordinate with legal, compliance, and client teams

educational_qualification.minimum: B.Com / B.Tech / BBA with strong academics
alternative: CFA Charter for research and analyst roles

jobs.future_scope: Highly lucrative career path. PE, hedge funds, and startups offer exits from IB roles. Significant international mobility.

jobs.title: Chartered Financial Analyst (CFA) / Equity Research Analyst
jobs.description: Research and analyze publicly listed companies, industries, and economic trends to develop investment recommendations for asset managers, brokerages, and investors.
roles_responsibilities: Analyze company financials, balance sheets, and earnings
Build financial models and produce earnings forecasts
Write equity research reports with buy/sell/hold recommendations
Track industry trends and competitive landscape
Interact with company management during earnings calls
Support fund managers in portfolio decision-making

alternative: CA + relevant experience

jobs.future_scope: India's growing capital markets and MF industry are driving demand. Senior analysts and fund managers earn significantly more.

jobs.title: Actuary
jobs.description: Use mathematical and statistical methods to assess financial risks in insurance, pensions, and financial markets. Design and price insurance products and pension schemes.
roles_responsibilities: Analyze statistical data to assess risk probabilities
Develop pricing models for insurance products
Evaluate pension fund liabilities and valuations
Prepare actuarial reports and certifications
Advise on regulatory solvency requirements
Model financial projections under various scenarios

preferred: Institute and Faculty of Actuaries (IFoA) exams
Institute of Actuaries of India (IAI) qualification
alternative: Strong mathematics background + actuarial exams

jobs.future_scope: Scarce talent supply with high demand from insurance companies, consulting firms, and banks. Fully qualified actuaries command premium salaries.

jobs.title: Civil Engineer
jobs.description: Design, plan, and oversee construction of infrastructure projects such as buildings, roads, bridges, dams, and water supply systems. Ensure structural safety and compliance with codes.
roles_responsibilities: Design structural elements of buildings and infrastructure
Prepare engineering drawings and technical specifications
Supervise construction activities and contractor work
Conduct site inspections and quality checks
Manage project timelines and budgets
Ensure compliance with building codes and safety norms

alternative: Diploma in Civil Engineering for site supervisor roles

jobs.future_scope: India's infrastructure push (Smart Cities, PMAY, highways) creates sustained demand. Senior site managers and project directors earn well.

jobs.title: Mechanical Engineer
jobs.description: Design, develop, test, and manufacture mechanical systems, machinery, and components across industries such as automotive, aerospace, manufacturing, and energy.
roles_responsibilities: Design mechanical components and assemblies using CAD tools
Analyze and test components for performance and durability
Develop manufacturing processes and optimize production
Troubleshoot mechanical failures and implement solutions
Collaborate with cross-functional engineering teams
Prepare technical documentation and reports

preferred: M.Tech in Manufacturing / Thermal Engineering / Automobile
alternative: Diploma in Mechanical Engineering for technician roles

jobs.future_scope: Automotive (EV), aerospace, defense, and manufacturing are key growth sectors. Design engineering in aerospace pays at a premium.

jobs.title: Electrical Engineer
jobs.description: Design, develop, and maintain electrical systems, power distribution networks, and electronic equipment for industries, utilities, and construction projects.
roles_responsibilities: Design electrical systems for buildings and industrial plants
Develop and test electrical circuits and components
Oversee installation of power distribution systems
Ensure compliance with electrical safety codes
Troubleshoot electrical faults and failures
Coordinate with civil and mechanical teams on projects

preferred: M.Tech in Power Systems / Control Systems
alternative: Diploma in Electrical Engineering for technician roles

jobs.future_scope: Renewable energy (solar, wind), EV infrastructure, and smart grids are creating new demand for electrical engineers in India.

jobs.title: Chemical Engineer
jobs.description: Design and optimize chemical processes and industrial plants for manufacturing chemicals, pharmaceuticals, food, and petroleum products. Ensure safety, efficiency, and environmental compliance.
roles_responsibilities: Design and optimize chemical manufacturing processes
Conduct pilot plant studies and scale-up to production
Monitor and control plant operations
Ensure compliance with safety and environmental regulations
Troubleshoot process issues and implement improvements
Collaborate with R&D teams on new formulations

alternative: B.Sc Chemistry + relevant certifications for lab roles

jobs.future_scope: Pharmaceuticals, petrochemicals, specialty chemicals, and green energy sectors offer stable careers. PSUs like ONGC, HPCL, BPCL recruit heavily.

jobs.title: Aerospace Engineer
jobs.description: Design, develop, test, and maintain aircraft, spacecraft, satellites, and missiles. Work in propulsion systems, aerodynamics, structural design, or avionics.
roles_responsibilities: Design aircraft and spacecraft structures and systems
Conduct aerodynamic analysis and CFD simulations
Develop and test propulsion systems
Perform structural integrity analysis (FEA)
Coordinate with manufacturing on design implementation
Ensure compliance with DGCA and international aviation standards

educational_qualification.minimum: B.E. / B.Tech in Aerospace / Aeronautical Engineering
alternative: Mechanical Engineering with aerospace specialization

jobs.future_scope: India's growing space sector (ISRO, private space startups), defense aerospace (HAL, DRDO), and MRO industry offer strong prospects.

jobs.title: Environmental Engineer
jobs.description: Develop solutions to environmental problems including pollution control, waste management, water treatment, and sustainable engineering practices.
roles_responsibilities: Design water and wastewater treatment systems
Conduct environmental impact assessments (EIA)
Develop pollution control strategies for industries
Monitor air, water, and soil quality
Ensure compliance with pollution control norms (CPCB, SPCB)
Advise on sustainable and green engineering practices

educational_qualification.minimum: B.E. / B.Tech in Environmental / Civil Engineering
alternative: B.Sc Environmental Science with relevant certifications

jobs.future_scope: Environmental regulations tightening in India. ESG mandates and climate tech are creating new roles for environmental engineers in consulting, industry, and policy.

jobs.title: Graphic Designer
jobs.description: Create visual content for print and digital media including logos, branding materials, marketing collateral, social media graphics, and web design assets.
roles_responsibilities: Design logos, brochures, posters, and brand identity elements
Create digital graphics for social media and web
Collaborate with marketing and content teams
Prepare print-ready files for production
Maintain brand style guides and design consistency
Present design concepts to clients or stakeholders

educational_qualification.minimum: Diploma / Bachelor's in Graphic Design, Visual Communication, or Fine Arts
alternative: Online design certifications + strong portfolio

jobs.future_scope: Growing demand from startups, agencies, and e-commerce brands. Freelancing offers strong income potential. Motion graphics and UI/UX are high-growth adjacencies.

jobs.title: Fashion Designer
jobs.description: Create original clothing, accessories, and footwear designs. Research fashion trends, sketch designs, select fabrics, and oversee garment production.
roles_responsibilities: Research current and upcoming fashion trends
Create sketches and technical drawings of designs
Select fabrics, colors, and materials
Oversee sample development and fitting
Collaborate with production and merchandising teams
Present collections at fashion shows or client presentations

educational_qualification.minimum: B.Des / B.Sc Fashion Design (NIFT, Pearl Academy, Symbiosis)
preferred: Post-Graduate Diploma / M.Des in Fashion Design
alternative: Diploma in Fashion Design + industry experience

jobs.future_scope: India's textile and fashion export industry is a global leader. Sustainable fashion and direct-to-consumer brands are creating new design opportunities.

jobs.title: Interior Designer
jobs.description: Plan and design interior spaces for homes, offices, restaurants, and commercial establishments. Balance aesthetics, functionality, and client requirements in space design.
roles_responsibilities: Consult with clients to understand their space and design preferences
Develop interior design concepts and mood boards
Create 2D and 3D design renderings
Select furniture, materials, lighting, and decor
Coordinate with architects, contractors, and vendors
Oversee project execution and ensure design intent is maintained

alternative: Diploma in Interior Design + portfolio

jobs.future_scope: India's booming real estate and construction sector drives demand. Senior designers and boutique firms can earn significantly more.

jobs.title: Animator / Motion Graphics Artist
jobs.description: Create 2D and 3D animated content for films, television, gaming, advertising, and digital media. Bring characters and visual concepts to life through motion and storytelling.
roles_responsibilities: Create 2D and 3D animations for various media
Develop character rigs and animation cycles
Design motion graphics for advertisements and explainer videos
Collaborate with directors and creative teams on storyboards
Apply visual effects and compositing
Optimize animations for gaming and interactive media

educational_qualification.minimum: B.Des / Diploma in Animation, Multimedia, or Fine Arts
alternative: Online certification + strong portfolio (YouTube, Vimeo)

jobs.future_scope: India's animation and VFX industry is growing with global studios outsourcing work. OTT boom has increased demand for motion designers and VFX artists.

jobs.title: Journalist / Reporter
jobs.description: Research, investigate, and report on news stories and events for newspapers, magazines, television, radio, or digital media platforms.
roles_responsibilities: Identify and investigate newsworthy stories
Conduct interviews with sources and experts
Write accurate and compelling news articles or scripts
Verify information and fact-check stories
Meet editorial deadlines consistently
Build and maintain a network of reliable sources

educational_qualification.minimum: Bachelor's Degree in Journalism / Mass Communication
alternative: Any graduation + relevant internship at media house

jobs.future_scope: Digital journalism and independent media are growing. Investigative journalism and data journalism are high-demand niches. Senior editors and anchors earn well.

jobs.title: Content Writer / Copywriter
jobs.description: Create written content for websites, blogs, marketing materials, social media, and advertising. Copywriters focus on persuasive commercial content while content writers produce informational or editorial content.
roles_responsibilities: Write SEO-optimized blogs, articles, and website content
Create advertising copy for print, digital, and social media
Develop brand voice and tone guidelines
Edit and proofread content for clarity and quality
Research topics thoroughly before writing
Collaborate with designers and marketing teams

alternative: Strong writing portfolio with proven track record

jobs.future_scope: Content marketing is an essential part of digital businesses. Freelance writing and agency roles offer flexibility. Specialization in tech, finance, or legal writing commands premium rates.

jobs.title: Public Relations (PR) Specialist
jobs.description: Manage the public image of organizations, individuals, or brands. Develop and implement PR strategies, manage media relationships, and handle communications during crises.
roles_responsibilities: Develop and execute PR campaigns and press strategies
Write and distribute press releases and media kits
Build and maintain relationships with journalists and media
Monitor media coverage and prepare reports
Manage crisis communications and brand reputation
Organize press conferences and media events

educational_qualification.minimum: Bachelor's Degree in Journalism / Mass Communication / PR
alternative: Any graduation + internship in PR agency

jobs.future_scope: Growing demand from startups, political parties, and large corporations. Digital PR and ORM (Online Reputation Management) are fast-growing niches.

jobs.title: Video Producer / Videographer
jobs.description: Plan, shoot, and edit video content for advertising, corporate communications, documentaries, social media, and entertainment. Manage full production lifecycle from concept to final cut.
roles_responsibilities: Develop video concepts, storyboards, and scripts
Operate camera, lighting, and audio equipment on shoots
Direct talent and manage production logistics
Edit raw footage into polished final videos
Add color grading, music, and visual effects
Deliver content optimized for various platforms (YouTube, Instagram, TV)

educational_qualification.minimum: Diploma / Bachelor's in Film, Media, or Mass Communication
alternative: Self-taught with strong portfolio and YouTube presence

jobs.future_scope: OTT explosion, digital advertising, and YouTube creator economy are driving demand. Corporate video production is a stable, high-volume market.

jobs.title: Business Development Executive / Manager
jobs.description: Identify new business opportunities, build client relationships, and drive revenue growth through strategic partnerships, sales, and market expansion.
roles_responsibilities: Identify and pursue new business opportunities and leads
Build and maintain relationships with prospects and partners
Prepare proposals, pitches, and presentations
Negotiate contracts and close deals
Conduct market research and competitive analysis
Coordinate with product and marketing teams on go-to-market strategies

alternative: Strong sales track record + relevant industry experience

jobs.future_scope: BD roles are critical for every growing company. Strong performers progress rapidly to leadership. SaaS and startup BD roles offer ESOPs and high variable pay.

jobs.title: E-Commerce Executive / Marketplace Manager
jobs.description: Manage product listings, pricing, promotions, and operations across e-commerce marketplaces like Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho. Drive online sales and optimize catalogue performance.
roles_responsibilities: Manage product listings, content, and imagery on marketplaces
Monitor and optimize pricing and promotions
Analyze sales performance and marketplace metrics
Coordinate with logistics and warehouse teams for order fulfillment
Handle customer returns, refunds, and disputes
Run ad campaigns on Amazon AMS / Flipkart Ads

alternative: Hands-on experience selling on Amazon/Flipkart

jobs.future_scope: India's e-commerce sector continues to expand rapidly. D2C brands and quick commerce are creating many new specialized roles.

jobs.title: Procurement / Purchase Executive
jobs.description: Source and purchase materials, goods, and services for organizations. Evaluate suppliers, negotiate prices, and manage procurement processes to ensure cost efficiency and quality.
roles_responsibilities: Identify and evaluate potential suppliers and vendors
Obtain and compare quotations (RFQ/RFP)
Negotiate pricing, terms, and contracts with suppliers
Raise and process purchase orders
Monitor delivery timelines and resolve supply issues
Maintain vendor master data and procurement records
jobs.future_scope: Strategic procurement and global sourcing are high-value career paths. Manufacturing and infrastructure companies recruit heavily for procurement roles.

jobs.title: Customer Success Manager
jobs.description: Ensure customers derive maximum value from a company's products or services. Build long-term relationships, drive retention, manage renewals, and identify upsell opportunities.
roles_responsibilities: Onboard new clients and provide product training
Monitor customer usage and engagement metrics
Conduct regular check-in calls and business reviews
Identify and resolve customer issues proactively
Drive contract renewals and reduce churn
Identify upsell and cross-sell opportunities

alternative: Strong client-facing experience in any domain

jobs.future_scope: SaaS and subscription-based business models have made CS an essential function. Strong CS professionals can transition to leadership or sales roles.

jobs.title: Social Worker
jobs.description: Help individuals, families, and communities navigate social challenges such as poverty, abuse, mental health issues, and substance addiction. Connect people with resources and support systems.
roles_responsibilities: Assess clients' social, emotional, and economic needs
Connect clients with government schemes and community resources
Advocate for vulnerable populations
Maintain case records and submit reports
Collaborate with government agencies, NGOs, and healthcare providers
Conduct home visits and community outreach

alternative: Any graduation + field experience in social sector

jobs.future_scope: Growing demand in NGOs, CSR departments, government programs (ICDS, NRLM), UN agencies, and international development organizations.

jobs.title: NGO Program Officer / Development Professional
jobs.description: Plan, implement, and monitor social development programs in areas such as education, health, livelihood, women empowerment, or environmental sustainability for non-profit organizations.
roles_responsibilities: Design and implement community development programs
Monitor and evaluate program outcomes and impact
Prepare donor reports, proposals, and grant applications
Build partnerships with government bodies and CSR teams
Train and supervise field staff and community volunteers
Conduct needs assessments and baseline surveys

alternative: TISS / IRMA / XISS programs in Rural Development

jobs.future_scope: India's expanding CSR requirements and international development funding create growing opportunities. International NGO roles offer global exposure.

jobs.title: Chef / Cook (Professional)
jobs.description: Prepare and present high-quality food in restaurants, hotels, catering companies, or cloud kitchens. Specialize in a particular cuisine or cooking style.
roles_responsibilities: Plan and execute menus based on season, cost, and guest preferences
Prepare dishes according to recipes and presentation standards
Manage kitchen mise en place and preparation workflow
Ensure food safety and hygiene standards (FSSAI compliance)
Train junior kitchen staff and apprentices
Monitor food cost and reduce wastage

educational_qualification.minimum: Diploma in Hotel Management / Culinary Arts
preferred: International Culinary Certifications (Le Cordon Bleu, CIA)
alternative: Vocational culinary training + apprenticeship

jobs.future_scope: India's food service industry is booming. Cloud kitchens, celebrity chef brands, and international hotel chains offer exciting career trajectories.

jobs.title: Hotel Front Office Executive / Hospitality Associate
jobs.description: Serve as the primary point of contact for hotel guests. Manage check-ins, check-outs, reservations, and guest service requests to ensure a positive guest experience.
roles_responsibilities: Welcome and check in/out guests efficiently
Handle reservations and room assignments
Respond to guest inquiries and resolve complaints
Coordinate with housekeeping, F&B, and concierge teams
Process billing and payments
Maintain front desk records and occupancy reports

educational_qualification.minimum: Diploma / B.Sc in Hotel Management (IHM / NCHMCT)
preferred: B.Sc Hotel Management from IHM affiliated colleges
alternative: Any degree + hotel management certification

jobs.future_scope: India's hospitality industry is expanding with new hotels in tier-2 cities. International hotel brands offer global placement opportunities.

jobs.title: Nutritionist / Dietitian
jobs.description: Assess dietary needs and develop nutrition plans for individuals or groups to support health goals, manage medical conditions, or improve overall wellness.
roles_responsibilities: Conduct dietary assessments and nutritional evaluations
Develop individualized meal plans and dietary recommendations
Counsel patients or clients on nutrition and healthy eating
Support management of diet-related conditions (diabetes, obesity)
Create and review menus for hospitals, schools, or corporates
Conduct nutrition awareness programs and workshops

educational_qualification.minimum: B.Sc Home Science (Food & Nutrition) / B.Sc Nutrition & Dietetics
alternative: Certified Diabetes Educator (CDE) for clinical roles

jobs.future_scope: Growing health consciousness and chronic disease burden is increasing demand. Sports nutrition, clinical nutrition in hospitals, and online consulting are key growth areas.

jobs.title: Agricultural Officer / Agronomist
jobs.description: Provide technical guidance to farmers on crop production, pest management, soil health, and modern farming practices. Work in government, agribusiness, or NGO settings.
roles_responsibilities: Advise farmers on crop selection and cultivation practices
Monitor crop health, diseases, and pest infestations
Conduct soil testing and recommend fertilizer applications
Promote adoption of modern and sustainable farming techniques
Coordinate government agricultural schemes (PM-KISAN, PMFBY)
Prepare field reports and crop surveys

alternative: B.Tech Agricultural Engineering

jobs.future_scope: India's push for AgriTech and sustainable farming is creating new roles. Government agricultural services (ICAR, NABARD, State Depts) offer stable careers with perks.

jobs.title: Environmental Scientist
jobs.description: Study the natural environment and the impact of human activity on ecosystems. Develop strategies to address environmental problems such as pollution, deforestation, and climate change.
roles_responsibilities: Collect and analyze environmental data (air, water, soil)
Conduct Environmental Impact Assessments (EIA) for projects
Monitor pollution levels and regulatory compliance
Develop environmental management plans
Research climate change impacts and mitigation strategies
Prepare technical reports for regulatory bodies (MoEFCC, CPCB)

educational_qualification.minimum: B.Sc Environmental Science / B.Tech Environmental Engineering
preferred: M.Sc Environmental Science / M.Tech Environmental Engineering

jobs.future_scope: ESG mandates, climate policy, and green finance are rapidly expanding the role of environmental scientists in industry, consulting, and policy.

jobs.title: Food Scientist / Food Technologist
jobs.description: Research, develop, and improve food products, processes, and preservation methods. Ensure food safety, quality, and compliance with FSSAI and international food safety standards.
roles_responsibilities: Develop and test new food products and formulations
Optimize food processing and preservation methods
Conduct quality control and sensory evaluation of products
Ensure compliance with FSSAI and FSMS standards
Scale up lab formulations to commercial production
Investigate and resolve food safety incidents

educational_qualification.minimum: B.Sc / B.Tech in Food Technology / Food Science
alternative: B.Sc Chemistry / Microbiology + food tech certification

jobs.future_scope: India's packaged food and food export industry is growing. Opportunities in FMCG companies (Nestle, ITC, Britannia), FSSAI, and export-oriented food processing units.

jobs.title: Police Officer / Sub-Inspector (SI)
jobs.description: Maintain law and order, prevent and investigate crimes, enforce laws, and protect citizens. Entry into the force is through state police recruitment boards.
roles_responsibilities: Patrol assigned areas and respond to incidents and emergencies
Register and investigate FIRs and criminal cases
Arrest and produce accused persons before court
Collect evidence and prepare charge sheets
Maintain community relations and public safety
Execute court orders and warrants

educational_qualification.minimum: Any Bachelor's Degree + Pass State Police Sub-Inspector Exam
alternative: Constable-level entry with promotion exams for SI

jobs.future_scope: Government job with pension and strong social status. Promotions to Inspector, DSP, and IPS cadre through departmental exams and UPSC.

jobs.title: Indian Armed Forces Officer (Army / Navy / Air Force)
jobs.description: Serve in the Indian Armed Forces to protect national sovereignty and security. Officers lead troops or technical units and are recruited through NDA, CDS, or direct entry schemes.
roles_responsibilities: Lead and command troops or technical units
Plan and execute military operations and missions
Manage logistics, administration, and welfare of personnel
Conduct training and skill development for subordinates
Operate and maintain defense equipment and weapon systems
Represent India in peacekeeping and international defense cooperation

educational_qualification.minimum: 10+2 (for NDA) / Bachelor's Degree (for CDS, TES, AFCAT, SSC)
alternative: NDA after Class 12 for direct Officer entry at graduation equivalent

jobs.future_scope: Highly prestigious career with structured promotions. Post-retirement demand in corporate security, defense PSUs, and PMOs. Lateral entry into CAPFs also available.

jobs.title: Firefighter
jobs.description: Respond to fire emergencies, rescue operations, and hazardous material incidents. Protect life and property by controlling fires and providing emergency assistance.
roles_responsibilities: Respond rapidly to fire and emergency calls
Operate firefighting equipment including hoses, ladders, and breathing apparatus
Conduct search and rescue operations in burning or collapsed structures
Perform emergency medical response and first aid
Inspect buildings for fire safety compliance
Maintain and test firefighting equipment regularly

educational_qualification.minimum: 10+2 / Any Degree + State/Municipal Fire Services Recruitment
alternative: ITI Fireman qualification for entry-level roles

jobs.future_scope: Government service with pension. Fire safety roles in industrial and corporate sectors (fire safety officers) offer better pay. NDRF offers specialized emergency response careers.

jobs.title: IAS / IPS / IFS Officer (Civil Services)
jobs.description: Serve in India's premier administrative, police, or foreign service cadres. IAS officers manage district administration and policy, IPS officers lead law enforcement, and IFS officers represent India diplomatically.
roles_responsibilities: Formulate and implement government policies and programs
Manage district administration and public service delivery
Lead law enforcement agencies and criminal investigations (IPS)
Represent India in bilateral and multilateral diplomacy (IFS)
Oversee large-scale government development programs
Act as interface between government and citizens

educational_qualification.minimum: Any Bachelor's Degree + Clear UPSC Civil Services Exam (Prelims + Mains + Interview)
preferred: Top graduation + coaching from reputed institutes

jobs.future_scope: Most prestigious career in India. Rapid post-retirement opportunities in PSUs, autonomous bodies, tribunals, and international organizations (UN, World Bank).
